titleStmt.title: SII 15.9: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 9. (B.K. No. 444 of 1926.) BHĀVIHĀḶ, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Mallikārjuna temple.

This is dated the Chālukya-Vikrama year 50, Viśvāvasu, Pushya śu., Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, the tithi being lost. The date is irregular as in the said cyclic year the Saṅkramaṇa occurred on Pushya ba. 14, Friday, corresponding to 1125 A.D., December 25.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Jayakēśi of the Kadamba family along with his queen Maiḷala-mahādēvī, the daughter of the Chālukya emperor, was governing the provinces of Koṅkaṇa Nine-hundred and Palasige Twelve-thousand, the officers of Kundūr-nāḍu, viz., Śivarāja, Nāgavarma, Śaṅkarayya, and others made, under instructions from the governor, a gift of land and a house to the god Mallikārjuna of Māṇḍavyatīrtha of Halguṇḍi, for worship, offerings and lamp. Further gifts to the deity are mentioned. The name Halguṇḍi occurs as Palguṇḍige also.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśirascuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlasteṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ
© svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipurava
rādhīśvaraṁ samastabhuvanasaṁstoyamānaṁ haradharaṇīprasū
taṁ triḷōcanakadaṁbavaṁśānvaya mahīdharēṁdra śikharābhyudayamāna
mahāpracaṇḍamā¨rttaṇḍa mā¨rttaṇḍakarātitībranijapratāpa vaśīkrita
sakaḷamahīmaṇḍaḷanuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchanaṁ vānaramahādhvajaṁ pe¨rmma
ṭṭitū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭhitanaṣṭādaśāśvamēdhadī
kṣādīkṣita kuḷaprasotaṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdra sikharāsthāpita mahā
śaktiprabhāvaṁ tyāgajagajhaṁpa jhaṁpaḷācā¨ryyaṁ niśśaṁkarāmaṁ subhaṭakanaka
nikaśōpaḷaṁ śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraṁ lōkaikakaḷpadrumaṁ saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ mū
¨rttinārāyaṇaṁ kī¨rttimā¨rttaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭaṁ vairigharaṭṭaṁ subhaṭarājaśi
khāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyākhiḷarājāvaḷīsamāḷaṁkritarappa śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jayakēsi dēvaru śrīmaccāḷukyacakrēśvara priyatanūje mai
ḷalamahādēviyaruṁ palasige pannicchāsiramumaṁ koṁkaṇavoṁbhaynū
ṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . v® . Adaṭavirōdhi maṇḍa
ḷikaraṁ palaraṁ pariyiṭṭu kondu poṁgade śaraṇenda maṇḍaḷikaraṁ palaraṁ da
yeyiṁde kādu du¨rmmadarenisi maṇḍaḷikaraṁ palaraṁ piḍidu
kavaldu vṛtō¨rvviyoḷu beḷagidaṁ jasamaṁ jayakē
sivallabhaṁ . [I]ntanisi negaṟda jayakēsidēvara besadiṁ kundū¨rnnā
ḍadhikārigaḷu . śrīniḷayaṁ śivarājaṁ mānavanidhi nāgava¨rmmanāsritajanaka
ḷpāvanīja gaṁgaṇanabhimānadhanaṁ śaṁkarayyanivaratimudadiṁ . śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama
va¨rṣada 50 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsarada puṣya su sōmavāramutta
rāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta nimittamāgi śrīmatu halguṁḍiya
māṁḍavyatī¨rtthada mallikā¨rjunadēvaraṁgabhōga dhūpanivēdya naṁdādī
viga naḍavantāgibiṭṭa keymattareraḍuṁ hadinaydu kaynīḷada ma
ne voṁdu . jaladhiparivēṣṭitō¨rvvige palasige nāḍānanaṁ tadāna
na viḷasattiḷakaṁ palguṁḍigegīśvaradhā¨rmmika dhanyadibyajana saṁkī¨rṇna .
rele peṟaraṁ gelguṁ bhayalōbha laṁbha viṣayāsatyaṁ salgume satpra
ḷaka¨rppalguṁḍigeyaṟuva�¨rdda sabhayoḷavanitu . Antenisi nega¨rdda
ṇḍugaḷu beṁdaya reḍḍigāmaṇḍamutta saṇamagāmaṇḍaṁ gottayi
doḷu tōṁṭada nelana nābaḷada vaṁśada mādigāmaṇḍana magaṁ ba
noḍaṁbaḍisi nāmagāmaṇḍana magaṁ jayadēvagāmaṁḍana keyyo
raṁgabhōga dhūpa nivēdya naṁdādīvige naḍevantāgi biṭṭa tōṁbaThe rest of the record is broken off and
Digital edition of SII 15.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
